Max Pain at 645 (0DTE) provides upside magnet but heavy Call walls at 655 cap rallies. Watch 630 as the battleground - hold = bounce potential, break = cascade to 615.

0DTE Max Pain level (2.1% above spot). Natural attraction zone for pin risk. High Call OI (31,663) provides friction.
Major Put concentration across all expiries (0DTE: 14K, WEEKLY: 60K, MONTHLY: 33K). Second line of defense if 630 breaks.
Structural gamma equilibrium. Far below spot indicates deep negative gamma regime. Break below 600 = dealer panic selling acceleration.
High volume node (0DTE: 260K CALL vol, 77K PUT vol, MONTHLY: 103K Put OI). Near-term friction zone.
Weekly Max Pain + highest Weekly Call OI (15,766). Upper bound of dealer hedging zone.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Negative GEX (-1.31B) amplifies volatility; dealers short gamma.
outlook.summary: Market is in a short gamma regime (-1.31B GEX) with Spot (23039) trapped between immediate support at 22800 and heavy resistance at 23400-24000. The extreme Put OI at 24000 (Monthly) creates a 'call wall' effect. Expect volatile conditions with downward pressure unless 23400 breaks.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Significant OI in all expiries (0DTE 399, Weekly 42, Monthly 1471). Massive Put OI above spot forces dealers to sell deltas as price rises, creating structural resistance.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE Call OI (206) + Weekly Put OI (478). Dealers are short calls and short puts here, creating a high-traffic resistance zone just above spot.
0DTE Max Pain level. Despite bearish structure, magnet effect may pull price higher to minimize option payouts if volatility compresses.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE Put OI (212) + Monthly Put OI (237). Primary support zone. Dealers long gamma here should stabilize prices.
Major Monthly support (OI 732). Structural floor for the current move. Breakdown target if 22800 fails.
